parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filterGroups: [{ filters: [{ propertyName: 'createdate', operator: 'GTE', value: String(new Date(Date.UTC(new Date().getUTCFullYear(), new Date().getUTCMonth(), new Date().getUTCDate() - 1)).getTime()) }, { propertyName: 'createdate', operator: 'LT', value: String(new Date(Date.UTC(new Date().getUTCFullYear(), new Date().getUTCMonth(), new Date().getUTCDate())).getTime()) }] }], properties: ['name', 'domain', 'linkedin_company_page', 'numberofemployees'], limit: 200, ...($json.after ? { after: $json.after } : {}) }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const jinaResponse = $json;
const rawContent = jinaResponse.data || jinaResponse.body || jinaResponse.content || '';
const companyData = $('Check Has Domain').item.json;

const content = rawContent
  .replace(/!\[.*?\]\(.*?\)/g, '')
  .replace(/\[.*?\]\(https?:\/\/static\.wixstatic[^\)]*\)/g, '')
  .replace(/\[.*?cookiebot.*?\]\(.*?\)/gi, '')
  .replace(/this website uses cookies[\s\S]*?(?=\n#{1,3}\s|\n\n[A-Z]|$)/gi, '')
  .replace(/\n{3,}/g, '\n\n')
  .trim()
  .substring(0, 3000);

const hasContent = content.length > 50;

const prompt = hasContent
  ? 'You are analyzing a company website to estimate their employee count.\n\n'
    + 'Company: ' + companyData.companyName + '\n'
    + 'Domain: ' + companyData.domain + '\n\n'
    + 'Website Content:\n' + content + '\n\n'
    + 'Estimate the number of employees. Consider:\n'
    + '- Team pages, office locations, about sections\n'
    + '- Industry norms and company size indicators\n'
    + '- Revenue/client indicators if mentioned\n'
    + '- Job listings or hiring pages\n\n'
    + 'Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown):\n'
    + '{"employeeCount": <number>, "confidence": "high"|"medium"|"low"}\n\n'
    + 'If you cannot estimate, return: {"employeeCount": 5, "confidence": "low"}'
  : '';

return {
  json: {
    companyId: companyData.companyId,
    companyName: companyData.companyName,
    domain: companyData.domain,
    isSubsidiary: companyData.isSubsidiary || false,
    parentCompany: companyData.parentCompany || null,
    prompt,
    hasContent
  }
};

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.3 } }) }}

parameters.content:
## Phase 1: Paginated HubSpot Fetch
Fetches ALL companies created yesterday using cursor-based pagination (200/page).
Same pattern as industry-categorization workflow.

## Phase 2: Gemini Classification + 3-Way Route
Batch classify all companies as independent vs subsidiary.
Route: (A) no count + (B) subsidiary -> enrich | (C) independent with count -> skip

## Phase 3: Batch Amplemarket + Poll Loop
Single batch POST + poll every 15s until completed.
For subsidiaries, uses parent domain instead of branch domain.
